arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney lands new coaching job after Plymouth axe – and he'll begin next month
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney has been out of work since December after being sacked by Plymouth Argyle but is set to get back into coaching next month

arts.ttl: Hickey signs new long-term Brentford contract
arts.sum: Aaron Hickey has signed a new three-and-a-half-year contract with Brentford. The post Hickey signs new long-term Brentford contract appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Plymouth's latest Wayne Rooney update divides fans as sensational return hopes dashed
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle have named Wayne Rooney's replacement as head coach, with former Cercle Brugge manager Miron Muslic taking charge of the Championship strugglers

arts.ttl: Plymouth appoint Austrian Muslic as new boss
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle appoint Austrian Miron Muslic as their new head coach, succeeding Wayne Rooney.

arts.ttl: Plymouth appoint Austrian coach Miron Muslic to succeed Wayne Rooney
arts.sum: Muslic managed Cercle Brugge until December sacking ‘Miron comes with glowing reviews’ says Argyle chairman Plymouth have appointed Miron Muslic as the club’s new head coach to replace Wayne Rooney. The 42-year-old former Cercle Brugge manager has signed a three-and-a-half year deal to succeed Rooney, who left the club on New Year’s Eve. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Plymouth appoint Austrian coach Muslic as new boss
arts.sum: Plymouth Argyle appoint Austrian Miron Muslic as their new head coach, succeeding Wayne Rooney.

arts.ttl: Udinese Pursue Mads Roerslev from Brentford
arts.sum: Udinese are pursuing a new addition to their squad, with Danish right-back Mads Roerslev of Brentford emerging as a key target. Following a successful start to the season, where the team currently sits in ninth place in the Serie A standings, Udinese aims to strengthen their defensive line as they look to build on their momentum. The post Udinese Pursue Mads Roerslev from Brentford appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Brentford man ‘high on list’ for club but transfer unlikely to be ‘feasible’
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund have Brentford forward Kevin Schade ‘high on the list’ and have been interested in him for some time. That’s according to journalist Patrick Berger, who reports that there has been an initial exchange with the player’s entourage but not between Dortmund and Brentford. arts.ttl: ‘Unrealistic figures’ – Buying Brentford player seen as impossible, so loan is the only way
arts.sum: Mads Roerslev was linked with an exit from Brentford yesterday, with Italian side Udinese interested in a move for the defender. Gazzetta dello Sport have today reported the Serie A outfit are looking to improve at right-back and they believe Roerslev will improve their side, especially in terms of consistency.
